text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 14 

BENE_EDCTN_CD 

LABEL: Beneficiary Education 

DESCRIPTION: Beneficiary education level code. 

LONG NAME: BENE_EDCTN_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system 

VALUES: 1 = Less than High School Degree 
2 = High School Graduate or Equivalent 
3 = Some College 
4 = College Graduate 
Missing 

COMMENT: Nearly one-third (31%) of screenings have a missing value.
